caption: A man with white hair and a beard, wearing glasses and a light-colored Nehru jacket over a white shirt, stands behind a wooden podium. He is positioned against a textured, dark green stone wall with a decorative vertical pillar containing red flowers to his right. Two thin microphones extend from the podium toward him. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking while gesturing with his right hand. He has his index finger pointed upward in an emphasizing gesture. The scene is static, with no change in location, clothing, or objects; the only movement is the slight shifting of the man's facial expressions and the position of his gesturing hand as he speaks. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the frames.
